app_id.desc: The ID of the app whose icon you want to set.

url.desc: URL of a publicly hosted image

errors.error_bad_format: Icon must be a valid image file.
errors.invalid_icon_size: Icon dimensions must be between 512x512px and 2000x2000px.
errors.invalid_parameters: Only one of `URL` or `file` can be defined.
errors.missing_arguments: One of `URL` or `file` must be provided.
